General.Name: Hong Kong Education Intl Investments Ltd
General.Description: Bradaverse Education (Int'l) Investments Group Limited, an investment holding company, provides private educational services in Hong Kong. The company operates through Provision of Private Educational Services, Investments in Securities, Money Lending, and VR and Digital Entertainment segments. The company offers primary and secondary tutoring services, skill courses, test preparation courses, providing loans as a money lender, and trading of securities, English language training and international test preparation courses, and dance tuition services, as well as STEAM education services. It also trades in virtual reality and gaming products. It provides private education services under the Modern Education, Modern Bachelor Education, and Modern English brand names. The company was formerly known as Hong Kong Education (Int'l) Investments Limited and changed its name to Bradaverse Education (Int'l) Investments Group Limited in January 2023. Bradaverse Education (Int'l) Investments Group Limited was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Admiralty, Hong Kong.
